generated_oml:
instance LivingLabBuilding : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Living Lab building infrastructure within AECO domain serving as unified virtual representation for real-time monitoring, simulation, and life cycle optimization of physical building operations"
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, HumiditySensor, LuxSensor, CO2Sensor, OccupancySensor, LightingActuator
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for environmental monitoring supporting energy optimization"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data streams"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for environmental monitoring supporting energy optimization"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]

instance HumidityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time humidity data streams"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HumidityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance LuxSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for visual comfort analysis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LuxDataTransmitted
]

instance LuxDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LuxSensor
]

instance LuxData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time illuminance data streams"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LuxDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance CO2Sensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for non-visual health effects analysis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CO2DataTransmitted
]

instance CO2DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CO2Sensor
]

instance CO2Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time CO2 concentration data streams"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CO2DataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for post-occupancy data collection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data streams"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators for lighting systems in Building Control Systems (BCS) per BOREALIS project"
]

instance BIMModelingTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM tools for modeling building infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMModelValidationService
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono middleware for IoT data exchange"
    DTDFVocab:enables EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortService, NonVisualHealthEffectService
]

instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Ditto for digital twin management and device connectivity"
    DTDFVocab:enables EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortService, NonVisualHealthEffectService
]

instance UnrealEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for immersive visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables ImmersiveVisualizationService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering for automated artifact generation"
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMModelValidationService, RuntimeArtifactGenerationService
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM models enriched with Building Control System (BCS) runtime semantics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMModelingTool, ModelDrivenEngineering
]

instance EnergyUsagePatternsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Energy usage patterns derived from sensor data and analytics"
]

instance ComfortLevelsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual comfort levels assessed through light and environmental data"
]

instance HealthImpactAssessmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Non-visual health effects assessments based on environmental data"
]

instance AdjustBuildingSystemsAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusting building systems for optimization based on real-time analytics"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustLightingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusting lighting systems based on real-time analytics"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance BIMValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "BIM model validation results from MDE process"
]

instance RuntimeArtifactInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Runtime artifacts generated via Model-Driven Engineering"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D immersive visualization of building operations using Unreal Engine 5"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service for energy optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyUsagePatternsInsight, AdjustBuildingSystemsAction
]

instance VisualComfortService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for visual comfort analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides ComfortLevelsInsight
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for non-visual health effects analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides HealthImpactAssessmentInsight
]

instance ImmersiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Immersive visualization using Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance LightingControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Modular lighting control service as part of service-oriented architecture"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustLightingAction
]

instance BIMModelValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for BIM model validation in model-driven engineering process"
    DTDFVocab:provides BIMValidationInsight
]

instance RuntimeArtifactGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for generating runtime artifacts via MDE"
    DTDFVocab:provides RuntimeArtifactInsight
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of control commands (e.g., HVAC setpoints, lighting levels) from the DT to physical actuators via Eclipse Hono and Ditto, enabling real-time adjustments to building operations."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with continuous data flow for monitoring and control; no specific time intervals specified."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A modular constellation integrating BIM as the semantic backbone for spatial data, Eclipse Hono and Ditto for IoT data exchange, Unreal Engine 5 for immersive visualization, and extensible service modules for domain-specific functionality."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers all life-cycle stages including design, construction, operation, and refurbishment phases, providing continuous digital representation from initial planning through operational use and future modifications."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity assessed using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric, which measures interoperability and architectural soundness; no specific error margins or uncertainty quantification methods detailed."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Bidirectional data exchange via Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware without specified communication protocols."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Scalable deployment framework with no specific hosting environment details provided in the document."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems through Eclipse Hono and Ditto for interoperability, though specific external systems beyond BIM and DT components are not detailed."
]
